chk_course_prerequisite_kind.name: chk_course_prerequisite_kind
chk_course_prerequisite_kind.value:
("course_prerequisite"."prerequisite_type" = 'course' AND "course_prerequisite"."prerequisite_curriculum_course_id" IS NOT NULL AND "course_prerequisite"."required_cycle" IS NULL)
    OR
    ("course_prerequisite"."prerequisite_type" = 'completed_cycle' AND "course_prerequisite"."prerequisite_curriculum_course_id" IS NULL AND "course_prerequisite"."required_cycle" IS NOT NULL)
